mapper.select: SELECT rp.role_id, rp.permission_id, r.role_id AS role_roleId, r.role_name AS role_roleName, p.permission_id AS permission_permissionId, p.permission_name AS permission_permissionName FROM role_permissions rp LEFT JOIN roles r ON rp.role_id = r.role_id LEFT JOIN permissions p ON rp.permission_id = p.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} AND rp.permission_id = #{permissionId}

SELECT rp.role_id, rp.permission_id, r.role_id AS role_roleId, r.role_name AS role_roleName, p.permission_id AS permission_permissionId, p.permission_name AS permission_permissionName FROM role_permissions rp LEFT JOIN roles r ON rp.role_id = r.role_id LEFT JOIN permissions p ON rp.permission_id = p.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT rp.role_id, rp.permission_id, r.role_id AS role_roleId, r.role_name AS role_roleName, p.permission_id AS permission_permissionId, p.permission_name AS permission_permissionName FROM role_permissions rp LEFT JOIN roles r ON rp.role_id = r.role_id LEFT JOIN permissions p ON rp.permission_id = p.permission_id WHERE rp.permission_id = #{permissionId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM role_permissions WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND permission_id = #{permissionId}
